missables: Rod of Wisdom — Destruction Sphere, Besaid Temple. Dark Valefor blocks return in HD.
sgTip: Yuna joins here. Prioritise NulBlaze and NulShock — they trivialise the next two Sinspawn fights.

subLocations.name: Beach
subLocations.prose: Head east along the beach before entering the village. The Moon Crest chest is in the eastern alcove — missable once you leave Besaid.

subLocations.name: Besaid Village
subLocations.prose: Talk to NPCs and check chests around the huts.

subLocations.name: Besaid Temple
subLocations.prose: Complete the Cloister of Trials. Get the Destruction Sphere chest before leaving — unavailable after Valefor fight.
